presets.name: Text Inputs
presets.children:
<TextInput
    id="first-name"
    label="First Name"
    name="firstName"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter first name"
    value={formFields.firstName}
/>
<TextInput
    id="middle-initial"
    label="Middle Initial"
    name="middleInitial"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter middle initial"
    value={formFields.middleInitial}
/>
<TextInput
    id="last-name"
    label="Last Name"
    name="lastName"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter last name"
    value={formFields.lastName}
/>

presets.name: Full Width
presets.children:
<TextInput
    id="first-name-full-width"
    label="First Name"
    name="firstName"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter first name"
    value={formFields.firstName}
/>
<TextInput
    id="middle-initial-full-width"
    label="Middle Initial"
    name="middleInitial"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter middle initial"
    value={formFields.middleInitial}
/>
<TextInput
    id="last-name-full-width"
    label="Last Name"
    name="lastName"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter last name"
    value={formFields.lastName}
/>

presets.name: Search Button
presets.children:
<TextInput
    id="search-with-action"
    label="Search"
    name="search"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Search"
    value={formFields.search}
/>
<Button
    onClick={() => alert("Button clicked!")}
    text="Submit"
    variant="secondary"
/>

presets.name: Select
presets.children:
<TextInput
    id="artist-name"
    name="artistName"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter Artist Name"
    value={formFields.artistName || ""}
/>
<Select
    blankSelection="Genre"
    name="genre"
    options={[
      { value: "Country" },
      { value: "Pop" },
      { value: "Rock" },
      { value: "Hip-Hop/Rap" }
    ]}
/>

presets.name: Date Picker
presets.children:
<TextInput
    id="event-name"
    label="Event"
    name="eventName"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Event Name"
    value={formFields.eventName}
/>
<DatePicker
    label="Event Date"
    pickerId="form-group-event-date"
/>

presets.name: Typeahead Action
presets.children:
<Typeahead
    id="products"
    label="Products"
    options={[
      { label: "Windows", value: "windows" },
      { label: "Roof", value: "roof" },
      { label: "Siding", value: "siding" },
      { label: "Doors", value: "doors" }
    ]}
/>
<Button
    onClick={() => alert("Product added!")}
    text="Add"
    variant="secondary"
/>

presets.name: Selectable Cards
presets.children:
<SelectableCard
    checked={formFields.animal === "cat"}
    inputId="cat-option"
    multi={false}
    name="animal"
    onChange={handleAnimalChange}
    value="cat"
>
  Cat
</SelectableCard>
<SelectableCard
    checked={formFields.animal === "dog"}
    inputId="dog-option"
    multi={false}
    name="animal"
    onChange={handleAnimalChange}
    value="dog"
>
  Dog
</SelectableCard>

text_inputs.message: Text Inputs uses state-backed child inputs so the playground fields stay editable.

full_width.message: Full Width applies fullWidth to the FormGroup while leaving each child input editable.

search_button.message: Search Button pairs a controlled text field with an action button in the same group.

select.message: Select shows mixed children inside the group, with the options array kept directly in editable children.

date_picker.message: Date Picker combines a text input with a picker child, including the pickerId required by the kit.

typeahead_action.message: Typeahead Action mirrors the docs pattern of a searchable Typeahead plus an adjacent button.

selectable_cards.message: Selectable Cards keeps both card options in children so each option can be edited together.

children.default:
<TextInput
    id="first-name"
    label="First Name"
    name="firstName"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter first name"
    value={formFields.firstName}
/>
<TextInput
    id="middle-initial"
    label="Middle Initial"
    name="middleInitial"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter middle initial"
    value={formFields.middleInitial}
/>
<TextInput
    id="last-name"
    label="Last Name"
    name="lastName"
    onChange={handleFieldChange}
    placeholder="Enter last name"
    value={formFields.lastName}
/>
